raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "A single-payer system will cost less than the current healthcare system in California.",
    "A single-payer healthcare model can safeguard the state from future deficits while stimulating economic growth.",
    "The Healthy California for All Commission found that under a single-payer model, California would save between $32 billion to $213 billion over 10 years compared to the current system.",
    "The Commission estimated that California would pay about $42 billion less in administrative costs each year under the single-payer model.",
    "Enacting CalCare would redirect savings to patients to provide comprehensive benefits and expand coverage to all Californians.",
    "Despite high healthcare spending, the United States ranks near the bottom on many international health indicators, including average life expectancy and preventable disease-related deaths.",
    "Under CalCare, care decisions would be determined by patients' healthcare professionals rather than insurance companies and corporate boardrooms.",
    "A fully funded single-payer health care system is the best long-term investment for California to protect against future deficits."
  ]
}
```
